overall.description: A cinematic view of a gothic great hall filled with students dining at long wooden tables, illuminated by floating candles overhead. The scene appears to be from a Harry Potter video game, featuring medieval stone architecture, vaulted ceilings, and a magical atmosphere with warm golden lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary camera positioned in the center aisle observing the dining hall and students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at the right table eating and conversing
student in dark robes sitting at the left table facing toward the center aisle

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air beneath the vaulted ceiling, providing warm golden illumination
red and gold house banner with lion crest hanging at the front of the center table
long wooden banquet tables extending down the length of the hall, laden with food and plates
tall stone columns lining the left side of the hall supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall stone columns lining the right side of the hall supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall arched stained glass windows on the left wall showing dark night outside
tall arched stained glass windows on the right wall showing dark night outside
high gothic vaulted stone ceiling with ribbed arches disappearing into shadows above the candles

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady cinematic view of the Great Hall, a vast gothic dining chamber illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden house tables eating and conversing, while the Gryffindor banner hangs prominently in the foreground. The stone pillars and arched windows line the sides of the hall, creating a magical medieval atmosphere typical of the Harry Potter universe.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a vast gothic dining chamber that emphasizes the magical scale of the Great Hall. It begins with a wide view of the space, where thousands of floating candles cast a warm glow over students in dark robes gathered at long wooden house tables. As the camera lingers, the focus highlights the interplay between the bustling students and the imposing stone pillars and arched windows that line the hall. The scene then settles on the prominent Gryffindor banner in the foreground, grounding the medieval atmosphere within the specific house identity before the shot concludes.
